name: Garlic New Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes in a large saucepan with enough water to cover by 3 inches.
2. Add 2 teaspoons salt and bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat to medium and cook, uncovered, for 15 minutes, until just tender when pierced with a fork.
4. Drain well. When cool enough to handle, cut potatoes into quarters and transfer to a baking pan large enough to hold them in a single layer; set aside.
5. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
6. In a food processor fitted with a metal blade, combine roasted garlic, olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and the remaining 1 teaspoon salt. Process until pureed.
7. Pour garlic mixture over potatoes and toss to coat.
8. Bake for 15 minutes. Sprinkle with parsley, marjoram, rosemary, thyme, and pepper; toss again.
9. Bake 5 to 10 minutes longer, until potatoes begin to turn golden. Serve warm.
Yield: 6 servings
